reviews.review_title: Can’t find the token to enter the code
reviews.review_description: I looked in the app and everywhere else but I still can’t find it
Can’t use without mobile app, app doesn’t work

All of the other reviews are due to lack of understanding where to look to actually make this game functional and playable. First you need to the app, you also need to order the controller straps. You need to pay online. Once you do you need to go into the app get a code put it in the headset and your set. Once your done setting it up it is a wonderful simulater and game for goalies.

This game has a bunch of numbers at the beginning I don’t know what to do so I’m stuck all I see is green numbers in the VR I would not recommend this game it looks cool but it does not seem fun to me I had purchased it and that happened so do not purchase this game unless you want to get ripped off have a good day￼
It asked for a code so I went to the app but the token that gives you the code kept generating and saying EXPIRED Idk what to do.
When you get the game it seems fun but at the start you need to install the app on a device and it’s gives you a token although all of the tokens are expired
When I downloaded the game and app I went to play and needed the token but they are all expired
It asked me to put in q code when i started....i didnt know what to put so i couldnt do anything.....

I run the game and it says to put a token,sooo I go to the app and generate the token….but i says “expired” but I put the in anyway…….didn’t work I DID IT ABOUT 5 TIME AND IT DIDNT WORK AND WHY DO YOU EVEN NEED A TOKEN TO PLAY and and the devs won’t answer anybody’s questions about and it seems that they won’t troubleshoot it smh
Once we figured out how to access the tokens it’s been great!
I improved so much and it’s very fun. Everyone who left a bad review either didn’t have a subscription or they didn’t generate a token every time the got on.

This app with the stick mount is weirdly realistic. It has so many different modes and tracks drills to give you data on shots. I’ve had it for three days and am IN LOVE. This app is perfect for anyone. You can even create your own drills on the mobile app!!!!!!!!
SO 🔥🔥🔥🔥 BEST APP ON APP APP THING SO FUN APP NEVER BETTER APP, APP SUCKS PP APP GOOD APP NICE APP COOL APP COEMS APP FIRE GANG APP IS GANG
It didn't even let me play the app said my email wasn't valid do I couldn't make it work
